description: A production incident is blocking deployments in the 'staging' namespace. The security team recently attempted to install a policy enforcement tool but the installation failed midway, leaving orphaned admission webhooks that point to non-existent services. Diagnose and resolve the broken webhooks to unblock the namespace. Verify the fix by creating a deployment named 'webhook-test' in the 'staging' namespace using the image 'nginx:alpine' with 1 replica. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!

metadata.occupation: Computer Systems Engineer / Site Reliability Engineer
